title: Assemble, install and test pneumatic system kits
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Assemble, install and test pneumatic system kits demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare pneumatic system kit

pcs.text: Work order and workplace instructions are used to determine job requirements1.2 Assembly and installation information is identified from manufacturer specifications1.3 Tools and equipment are selected to meet job requirements and checked for quality and correct operation

elements.title: Assemble pneumatic system

pcs.text: Workplace procedures are identified and followed2.2 Pneumatic system kit is assembled according to manufacturer specifications 2.3 Pneumatic system kit is installed using installation procedures that comply with manufacturer specifications and tolerances and without causing damage to components or systems

elements.title: Test pneumatic system
